prediction_model.source: Hybrid full-data cache model: Jolpica full history + OpenF1 when free/working + FastF1 + Open-Meteo + ICS
prediction_model.logic: Mintlify-style feature groups plus full-data racing ensemble: grid, driver history, current-season car performance, team form, car telemetry, circuit experience, track traits, weather traits, tyre strategy, lap pace, pit stops, sprint, reliability, and race simulation scenarios

meeting.meeting_official_name: FORMULA 1 LENOVO GRAND PRIX DU CANADA 2026

notes: The FIA/F1 2026 rules introduce smaller, lighter cars, reduced drag/downforce targets, active aerodynamics, more electrical power, sustainable fuels, and Manual Override Mode.
Prediction should reward efficient aero switching, straight-line efficiency, energy deployment, traction, braking stability, reliability, and driver adaptability.
